title: bolbitis × terminans
intro: Bolbitis × terminans, also known as the Bolbitis fern hybrid, is a type of tropical aquatic plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bolbitis × terminans include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Bolbitis × terminans is often used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, and can be found in various forms, including dried leaves, extracts, and tinctures.
